original_statement: what year did she receive her most recent highest rated position?
mutated_statement: what year did she experience her most recent highest rated something?
mutation_analysis: 动词替换 + 名词泛化: “receive” 被替换为 “experience” (receive→experience) | “position” 被泛化为模糊指代 “something” (position→something)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中对表格位置的直接说明（“The highest (best) position achieved is 2nd... The most recent of these is 2012”）以及simple_query返回2012的具体答案，可见Agent直接将变异问题视为明确的“最高名次”查询。日志中未出现任何关于“something”或动词替换带来歧义的提示，也未请求澄清或表达不确定性。Agent按自己的理解处理问题并给出具体年份，故判为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
